{{Quote|Goodness gracious me…|U-THR in times of trouble|<ref name="Crimson Jailbreak">{{JournalCite|5|Crimson Jailbreak}}</ref>}}
'''U-THR''', also known as '''Uthre''', was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] owned by a [[free-trader]] named [[Crimson]]. A [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO]] Human-cyborg relations protocol droid, U-THR was of a slightly more bulky build than the standard 3PO model. It had the prissy character traits that were typical of 3PO droids.

U-THR served aboard Crimson's [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''[[Starlight Red]]'', where he kept track of the ship's sensors. Although finding Crimson a bit too talkative, U-THR was loyal to her and would do anything within his programming to serve her.

When Crimson was arrested by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities on [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]], Uthre took it upon himself to liberate her. Having found out that Crimson was held prisoner in Byblos [[Byblos Starport Tower 214|Tower 214]], Uthre devised a plan to free her. While the nature of the plan is not certain, it may have involved either a [[Binary loadlifter/Legends|binary loadlifter]] or an [[angry Rodian]] entering the [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] office to create a diversion.
